iendly, inimical and neutral relationships
amongst the planets.
SUN
Sun is the father of Saturn. The son Saturn is inimical to the
father, the Sun. Similarly Venus and Dragon Head are inimical to
Sun. While Saturn indicates work; Venus indicates luxury and
wealth: and Dragon Head indicates Kalapurusha.
Saturn is Tamoguna, whereas the Sun stands for Rajoguna.
Therefore though sun and Saturn are father and son, they are
inimical to each other because of their inherent qualities, Saturn's
mother is Chayadevi, chay meaning shadow. Sun is glow, speed,
light and king. Saturn's Slow, dark, Lazy and a sincere servant.
Because of such opposing characters sun and Saturn are
astrologically considered to be inimical. Venus stands for wealth,
luxury and female. Sun-the Atrnakaraka or cause of Soul is not
interested in the above causitive factors ofVenus. So Venus is
astrologically considered to be inimical to Sun.

30 FUNDAMENTAL OF RAO'S SYSTEM OF NADI ASTROLOGY
Dragon Head is demonic.
